reviews.school_name: Manchester Global School Hyderabad - Kandukur Mandal
reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: Manchester Global School has a proper vision. With CBSE and MYP hand-in-hand and now, the much taken IB Diploma Programme, I think the school is setting that vision in the right manner. It's good to see that there are teachers who are trained in this vision and that there is a campus with the right facilities such as modern labs, cafeteria, modern classrooms, a state-of-the-art library etc. My son is in the Grade 1 and he thoroughly enjoys the school and the learning. It is essential to find the right school for your children and I feel MGS is that school. All the best to learning and building a futur

reviews.school_name: Manchester Global School Hyderabad - Kandukur Mandal
reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body:
Our experience with the school has been exceptionally positive across all areas. The teachers are highly qualified, dedicated, and genuinely invested in each child’s growth. They are friendly, approachable, and provide a strong support system for both students and parents. The school’s management and staff deserve equal appreciation for maintaining high standards and ensuring smooth functioning on all fronts. The admissions team is absolutely top-notch. They are extremely supportive, responsive, and helpful in guiding new parents through every step of the admission process, making the transition smooth and stress-free.

The infrastructure is excellent—spacious, modern, and well maintained. The facilities provided to the students, including classrooms, sports areas, and learning spaces, are thoughtfully designed to support both academic and extracurricular development. The infirmary is clean, hygienic, and well managed, ensuring that children receive immediate and proper care whenever needed. The in-house food is nutritious and hygienically prepared, and the school ensures a safe and clean environment throughout the campus. Transportation services are also top-notch, with buses that are comfortable, well maintained, and cover all major areas, making daily commute very convenient for families.

One of the strongest aspects of the school is its emphasis on student wellbeing. The social–emotional counsellor is excellent, and children receive personal attention that helps them thrive not just academically but emotionally as well. Academically, the school’s IB curriculum is delivered extremely well. Both the PYP and MYP coordinators, along with all the teachers, do an outstanding job at maintaining high academic standards while also nurturing creativity and critical thinking. The school ensures that parents stay actively involved in their child’s progress through Toddle updates, in-person meetings, and regular communication.

Extra-curricular exposure is outstanding. Students get opportunities to participate in debates, MUNs, chess, sports competitions, and various events that help build confidence and leadership skills. All festivals, milestones, and school events are celebrated with enthusiasm, giving students a wholesome school experience. PTMs happen regularly and provide meaningful, personalised feedback. Overall, the school offers a perfect balance of academics, sports, wellbeing, and personal development, making it a wonderful environment for children to grow and excel. Many thanks to the school!!!

reviews.school_name: Manchester Global School Hyderabad - Kandukur Mandal
reviews.author: Samrat Banerjee
reviews.review_body: The school has been an excellent choice for our daughter. She is truly happy here, and we can see the positive impact the environment has on her overall growth. The school is supportive, and nurturing, allowing her to learn, explore, and express herself with confidence. We are pleased with the school’s commitment to providing a safe and encouraging space for every child.

reviews.school_name: Manchester Global School Hyderabad - Kandukur Mandal
reviews.author: Sadanand Kadari
reviews.review_body:
Moving from the USA to India, one of my biggest concerns was the kind of education my children would receive here.I came across Manchester Global at the perfect time.

The school’s infrastructure is thoughtfully planned and impressive. I initially had questions about how an curriculums like IB would be delivered in India, especially around teacher training. After interacting with Mr. Tony, I gained tremendous clarity. We had an insightful discussion on holistic education, and I was reassured by the school’s strong focus on teacher selection, training, and alignment with the founders’ mission.

I see a lot of energy, vision, and sincerity in the leadership. My children have become more curious, expressive, and excited about learning, and I truly appreciate the IB approach being implemented here.

A wonderful school with passionate founders. I look forward to seeing Manchester Global shape young minds in a way that goes beyond the limits of conventional, industrial-style schooling

reviews.author: MSK
reviews.review_body: Manchester Global School has a proper vision. With CBSE and MYP hand-in-hand and now, the much taken IB Diploma Programme, I think the school is setting that vision in the right manner. It's good to see that there are teachers who are trained in this vision and that there is a campus with the right facilities such as modern labs, cafeteria, modern classrooms, a state-of-the-art library etc. My son is in the Grade 1 and he thoroughly enjoys the school and the learning. It is essential to find the right school for your children and I feel MGS is that school. All the best to learning and building a future.

reviews.school_name: Manchester Global School Hyderabad - Kandukur Mandal
reviews.author: Ramesh Avala
reviews.review_body: As a parent who moved my kids from the United States, Manchester Global School has provided a very positive experience for both of them. The teachers are supportive, the environment is welcoming, and there is an excellent balance between academics and extracurricular activities. It is truly a place that encourages learning and personal growth.
